author: 4dpN
content: Plan: Add sync_precommit_linter_versions() to scripts/update.py. Parses environment.yaml for black/isort/mypy versions, compares with .pre-commit-config.yaml revs, updates pre-commit to match conda. Regex-based to preserve formatting. Called after repin.sh, before npm bumps. Also update Release-Checklist.md.
